critic_notes: Solid pilot for a short, tabular section. All three questions correctly anchor to the version history and all quotes match the normalized source verbatim (including the bullet `•` glyphs, which survive normalization). Correct answers are verifiable and distractors are clean. Topic `standards` is acceptable for a section about the BSI document lineage itself. Difficulty `basis` fits the factual nature of the content. The generator handled the tabular layout (Stand/Version/Änderungen + bullet lists) well by concatenating bullets with the `•` separator; confirm this rendering convention is acceptable in the UI.

issues.detail: Quote is a verbatim substring after normalization (bullets preserved). It concatenates two separate bullet items from the CD 1.0 row with a `•` separator, which matches how they appear together on that row. Acceptable; noting the pattern for consistency across sections.
Quote concatenates three bullet items from the V 1.0 row with `•` separators. Matches normalized source as a substring. Same pattern as 1.1-002.
